files.name: easy_5sats_lownoise.npy
files.description: 5 satellites, low noise (sigma=2), mild leakage — good for testing detection sensitivity

files.name: medium_10sats.npy
files.description: 10 satellites, default settings — standard demo file

files.name: hard_15sats_noisy.npy
files.description: 15 satellites, heavy noise (sigma=5), strong leakage — stress test

files.name: medium_10sats_cleaned.npy
files.description: Pre-cleaned version of medium_10sats (leakage already removed)

note: All files are 2D numpy arrays, shape (n_freq, n_time), dtype float64, values in dB.
